ORDER RE PETITION AND MOTION TO COMPEL MEDIATION AND FOR APPOINTMENT OF NEUTRAL MEDIATOR.

PETITIONERS' PETITION TO COMPEL MEDIATION AND FOR THE APPOINTMENT OF NEUTRAL MEDITOR IS GRANTED.IT IS FURTHERE ORDERED THAT THE HONORABLE COLEMAN F. FANNIN(RET.) OF JAMS SAN FRANCISCO IS APPOINTED AS THE MEDIATOR IN THIS MATTER.

IT IS HEREBY ORDERED THAT RESPONDENTS' MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION IS DENIED. THE COST OF THE MEDIATOR IS TO BE SPLIT FIFTY-FIFTY BETWEEN RESPONDENTS AND PETITIONERS. MEDIATION IS TO BE COMMENCED WITHIN 30 DAYS OF ENTRY OF THIS ORDER.
